title: Completion Log
excerpt: Similar to the Creation Log column, I would love to see a completion log column to show who marked an item status complete and at what time. Additionally as valuable would be reporting capability added to that feature to…

posts.author: cchelf2 (Casey Chelf)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to the Creation Log column, I would love to see a completion log column to show who marked an item status complete and at what time. Additionally as valuable would be reporting capability added to that feature to indicate the duration between those two dates, and reporting that could show that data for all items across the board or in the portfolio.
